invite.setupAccount: Set up your account to access your assigned courses, track your progress, and earn certificates.

invite.setUpAccount: Set up your account to get started.

landing.heroTitle: Turn Any Document Into a Training Course in Minutes
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered Learning Management System. Simplify onboarding and training process, accelerate onboarding, and certify your workforce.
landing.everythingDesc: From AI-generated courses to compliance tracking and certification — Quali handles it all.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to transform your compliance training.
landing.readyToTransformDesc: Join forward-thinking companies already using Quali to streamline compliance and employee development.

features.aiCourseGenDesc: Upload any PDF, Word, or PowerPoint or Ask AI and get a complete course with quiz in under 2 minutes.
features.complianceTrackingDesc: Full audit trail of every course completion, quiz score, and certificate for regulatory reporting.
features.instantCertificatesDesc: Automatically generated certificates with unique IDs issued immediately upon passing.

steps.uploadDocDesc: Upload any policy, manual, or regulation document in PDF, Word, or PowerPoint format or prompt AI.
steps.aiGeneratesDesc: Our AI analyzes the content and creates a structured training course with interactive quiz questions.
steps.assignTrackDesc: Assign courses to employees, monitor progress in real-time, and generate compliance reports.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.demoSuccess: Thank you! We will be in touch within 24 hours.
pricing.demoFailed: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at hello@quali.ge
